chapter_title: About Dislike of Swearing in Business

hadith_entries.text:
975. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'I heard Allah's Messenger
saying: "Repetitive oaths by the seller to persuade the buyer
to purchase the commodity plights blessedness of the
transaction." (Bukhari).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
